name: Expo callout card
description: Compact pass reference showing the minimum shared language for fire, hold, pickup, delays, and escalation at the kitchen-to-floor boundary.
source_ref: core-v2: handoff language should be explicit enough to survive noise and speed
usage_moment: Use at the pass during live service until the callout standard is internalized.
expected_output: A shared pass script that reduces re-clarification and missed pickup signals.
